experience.subtitle: Product Engineering & Enterprise Backend Systems
experience.description: Architecting multi-role telehealth solutions, real-time analytics sync modules, event-driven call trackers, and automated marketing workflows handling bulk operations with high data reliability.
deliverables: Built a multi-role telecare consultation platform (doctor/patient/moderator) using Next.js + Zoom SDK, increasing telehealth revenue by 18% and reducing no-shows by 40%.
Designed and integrated an external-dialer-based call tracker system using webhook-driven event ingestion, improving sales attribution accuracy by 12%.
Engineered an AI Audio Analytics system as an extension of the call tracker—auto-transcribing calls, generating AI summaries, and producing daily/monthly actionable insights for organizations.
Developed a real-time Live Chat system using Firebase, enabling agents to communicate instantly with leads/customers directly from the dashboard, with read receipts and multi-agent routing.
Implemented Redis caching for real-time lead filtering and instant retrieval, reducing dashboard load times by 70%.
Integrated WebSockets across leads, bookings, AI analytics, and call-flow modules to deliver real-time updates across the organization dashboard.
Built a fault-tolerant bulk import/export system using AWS SQS + Worker Threads, improving data processing throughput by 60%.
Built automated daily performance insights combining email reports with AI-generated WhatsApp summaries, improving client engagement and retention by 18%.
Developed an ad click-to-conversion attribution pipeline (Facebook/WhatsApp) using SQS + webhooks, increasing campaign ROI visibility by 20%.
Built medication adherence dashboard with OTP verification and cron-driven reminders, improving treatment compliance by 45% and driving a 25% user base increase.
Rebuilt WhatsApp Business API UI and onboarding flow to significantly reduce integration failures and onboarding time.

experience.subtitle: Front-end & HRMS Development Foundations
experience.description: Engineered workflow automation interfaces and HRMS schemas, reducing manual administrative overhead and improving system search speeds.
deliverables: Developed React.js interfaces and authentication flows for an internal HRMS platform. Enhanced workflow automation through low-code modules and reduced administrative overhead by 30%.
Improved SQL Server query efficiency and standardized schema practices, contributing to a 40% improvement in data retrieval operations.
